sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ANSELMO del Vasto, son of BONIFAZIO Marchese del Vasto & his [first/second] wife [Alix de Savoie/Agnès de Vermandois] (-after 1140).

zh.Loreto Castle, Ancona, Marche, Italy: 義大利馬安科納洛雷托

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane於大約1100年出生在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦薩沃納時，他的父親Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria47歲，母親Alix de Savoie37歲。他和Anne Marie del Vento至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1162年在義大利皮蒙特辛塞瓦享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane于大约1100年出生在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦薩沃納时，他的父亲Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria47岁，母亲Alix de Savoie37岁。他和Anne Marie del Vento至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1162年在意大利皮蒙特辛塞瓦享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Alfio, Carmelo, Mariano, Pasquale, Angelina, Carmine, Gaetano, Gerardo, Guillermo, Leonardo, Lucio, Rocco, Rosario, Sal, Sebastiano.

variants.name: Vastola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alfonso, Amedeo, Carmine, Dino, Emileo, Salvator.
Italian (Campania; Vàstola): probably a derivative of Vasta .

variants.name: Basta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Adly, Attia, Hakeem, Hassan, Karim, Makram, Medhat, Mervat, Mohamed, Onsy, Sameh.

Italian (southern): perhaps from the personal name Basta, from basta ‘that's enough!’ (i.e. enough children in the family). Since the surname is found among the Albanian speakers of Calabria and Sicily, it may alternatively be of Albanian origin, probably related to 4 below.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name   Bastian   (short form of   Sebastian  ).

nameMeanings.name: Anselme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ‘divinity’ + ‘helmet’. St Anselm of Piedmont was Archbishop of Canterbury in the late 11th and early 12th centuries. See Anselm .

en.lifeSummary: When Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane was born about 1100, in Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italy, his father, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, was 47 and his mother, Alix de Savoie, was 37. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Anne Marie del Vento. He died in 1162, in Ceva, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane est né environ 1100, à Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italie, son père, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alix de Savoie, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Anne Marie del Vento. Il est décédé en 1162, à Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane um 1100 in Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria 47 und seine Mutter Alix de Savoie 37. Er hatte mit Anne Marie del Vento mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1162 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane è nato il circa 1100 nel Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italia, il suo padre, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Savoie, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Anne Marie del Vento. Morì nel 1162, nel Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesaneが約1100年にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァサボナで生まれた時，父Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguriaは47歳，母Alix de Savoieは37歳であった。彼はAnne Marie del Ventoとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1162年にイタリアピエモントクウネオセヴァで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane(이)가 대략 1100년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 서아폰아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Savoie(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Anne Marie del Vento(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 세바에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Savona, Genova, Liguria, Itália, seu pai, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Savoie, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Anne Marie del Vento. Ele faleceu em 1162, em Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane родился около 1100 г. в местности савона, дженова, лигуря, Италия, его отцу по имени Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Savoie, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Anne Marie del Vento. Он умер в 1162 г. в местности кева, кунео, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane nació aproximadamente 1100, en Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italia, su papá, Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Alix de Savoie, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Anne Marie del Vento. Murió en 1162, en Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 63 años.
